channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: ‘Miraculous’: US rescues second pilot downed in Iran, Trump confirms
item.description: Iran claims another US aircraft involved in the rescue of the F-15 fighter pilot has been shot down.

item.title: Trump’s unpopular war on Iran
item.description: Most Americans oppose the US-Israel war on Iran. ​​No recent US war has ever started off being this unpopular.

item.title: Iran says Iraqi ships can pass Strait of Hormuz as transits tick up
item.description: Tehran says Iraq will face no restrictions in waterway, praising country's 'struggle' against the US.

item.title: US satellite firm Planet Labs announces blackout on war on Iran images
item.description: Company says move amid US-Israel war on Iran comes after a request from the US government.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump confirms rescue of US officer, says ‘we got him’
item.description: Iran says US-Israeli attacks on the Mahshahr Petrochemical Zone have killed five and wounded 170.

item.title: How will Pakistan deal with the fallout from Iran war?
item.description: War in the Middle East is worsening economic crisis in Pakistan.

item.title: Indonesia receives bodies of peacekeepers killed in southern Lebanon
item.description: Foreign Minister Sugiono told reporters that Indonesia wants a thorough UN investigation into the deaths.

item.title: Israeli police arrest antiwar protesters in Tel Aviv
item.description: Israeli police clashed with protesters and made arrests in Tel Aviv as demonstrators rallied against the war on Iran.

item.title: Tehran psychiatric hospital not usable after US-Israeli strike
item.description: A psychiatric hospital in Tehran is no longer functioning after a US-Israeli strike, the hospital chief says.

item.title: Universities hit as US, Israel ramp up attacks on Iran’s infrastructure
item.description: Authorities say at least 30 universities impacted by US and Israeli strikes since the start of the war.
